fingerprint_summary: HCAD official bulk Real_acct_owner.zip (210 MB); deeds.txt (112 MB) + real_acct.txt (872 MB). Extract to /tmp/hcad/tsv/ and read plain files. Cloudflare holds search.hcad.org only; download host clean. clerk_id column bridges to County Clerk File#.
notes: Annual bulk is a snapshot — recent (May-Jun 2026) recordings not yet present; bridge returns 0 for those until next bulk.
